title: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time

title: Mister Maker - Patterns Picture
desc: Mister Maker makes a 'stone footprint', paints a fun firework picture that looks good enough to frame and squeezes a ship into a jar sailing on ship of blue rice. Guess the answer to today's shape puzzle, and watch 'The Mister Maker Kids' make a gigantic snail!

title: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time
desc: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time

title: Mister Maker - Treasure
desc: Mister Maker shows you how to make ancient looking buried treasure, splat monster pen pals and a super squashy foam boat that really can float! Guess the answer to the shape puzzle, and watch 'The Mister Maker Kid's' make a brilliant butterfly picture.

title: Mister Maker - Incredible Insects
desc: Mister Maker makes perfect patterns with a paper snowflake, shows how to make terrific art with the help of a cuddly toy and transforms an egg box into incredible insects! Guess the answer to today's shape puzzle and watch 'The Mister Maker Kid's' build a brilliant picture.

desc: Balram discovers Gatru and Matru's bribery. With Jagan and Batuknath, he fights dacoits, saving Gajapati

desc: When Burpee gets sore legs from dancing with Croakette, Darwin and Newts help by learning how to catch bugs for his lunch.

desc: Darwin and Newts go fishing but when Darwin's lucky fishing hat ends up in the river they must work out how to get it back.Stay tuned to find out!

desc: Darwin and Newts build a rock wall so Burpee can have some privacy.

desc: Darwin records a butterfly's life cycle when his swan plants attract a caterpillar that becomes a chrysalis, while Newts figures out how to paint a butterfly with symmetrically-patterned wings.

title: Darwin And Newts - Crabby Crabs
desc: Darwin and Newts learn about tides when they build sand castles out of wet sand and find they've disappeared the next day.Watch the fun and exciting episode and learn about sand and tide

title: Darwin And Newts - Our Little Forest Friends
desc: Darwin and Newts find an old log full of various insects fallen across a forest path, they then build a bridge over it to protect their new friends.They learn how to build a bridge?

title: Darwin And Newts - Burpee And Croakettes Iceskating Rink
desc: How ice melts into water? Newts tries to preserve some ice from a frozen pond to make Burpee and Croakette an iceskating rink, and she and Darwin learn about the different states of water.

title: Darwin And Newts - Darwin's Precious Collection
desc: Newts and Heni go searching for gold to complete Darwin's rock collection, while Darwin stays at the treehouse to grow crystals from his new crystal-growing set.

title: Darwin And Newts - Garden Emergency
desc: Darwin's garden starts drying out during a hot, rainless summer, the kids try different methods of watering it, eventually building an aqueduct using the water from Burpee's pond.
